text.title: Tech Radar (ThoughtWorks-Style) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: Are there ≥3 contested tooling/library decisions across the team?

conclusion.verdict: skip — handle individual decisions via ADR/RFC

branch.question: Can the team commit to a quarterly review cadence?

conclusion.verdict: author radar with 4 quadrants + evidence + owners

example.trace: input matches `contested_count >= 3` → sub-question → `cadence_committed == true` → conclusion ref=`quadrants-canonical`.
